evals.prompt: I want to make my SaaS product (a project management tool) agent-compatible so Claude can help users search for projects and tasks. What's the best approach?
evals.expected_output: Skill should recommend starting with llms.txt (discoverability), then adding MCP server for search tools. Should provide SaaS template and minimal MCP implementation.

evals.prompt: My documentation site gets crawled by AI agents but the HTML is super bloated with tracking pixels and CSS classes. How do I clean it up so agents get the real content?
evals.expected_output: Skill should explain HTML cleaning approach, provide both Node.js and Python implementations, suggest middleware for AI crawler detection.

evals.prompt: I have a Next.js app with a REST API. I want Claude to be able to call my endpoints directly. Should I use llms.txt or something else?
evals.expected_output: Skill should recommend MCP server approach for direct function calls, provide Next.js integration pattern, explain advantages over crawling.
